title: Saridhana Saridhana Lyrics Amara Kaaviyam Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Song: Saridhana Saridhana
Singer(s): Yazin Nizar, Thomson Andrews
Movie: Amara Kaaviyam
Music: M Ghibran

Idhan Munne Siruvan Naane
Inimaele Ilaignyan Naane
Irandirkum Naduvil Nee
Saridhaana?

Idhan Munne Snehithi Nee
Inimaele Kaadhali Nee
Irandirkum Naduvil Naan
Saridhaana?

Saridhaana Muraidhaana
Ithu Naana Naana Naana?
Viduvena Ezhuvena
Ini Naanaum Naanum Naana? (2)

Yaavum Pudhidhaai Theriyum Vayadhu
Yaavum Azhagaai Vizhyil Vizhyil Thrigiradhey
Netru En Kaadhile Ketta Paadale
Vearena Maariye Ketpadho Saridhaana?

Saridhaana Muraidhaana
Ithu Naana Naana Naana?
Viduvena Ezhuvena
Ini Naanaum Naanum Naana? (2)

Nenjam thadumarum Paruvam Ithuvo
Pengal Paarthaal
Lesa Idhayam Ganakiradho.
Thozhanin Kaadhali Thozhiya Thangaya
Rendume Illaiya Kelviye Saridhaana?

Azhagana Kirukkal Naan
Mudivilla Theruvum Naan
Kulir Kaattrin Kurumbum Naan
Inimaele..

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song 'Saridhana Saridhana'?

The song explores themes of love and longing, questioning the nature of relationships and emotional connections.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie 'Amara Kaaviyam'?

In Amara Kaaviyam, the song reflects the emotional struggles and romantic dilemmas faced by the characters, enhancing the narrative of the film.

Who are the singers and music director of the song?

The song features the talented voices of Thomson Andrews and Yazin, with music composed by M Ghibran.

When was 'Saridhana Saridhana' released?

The song was released on July 5, 2014.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In 'Saridhana Saridhana', the characters navigate the complexities of love and emotional connection, making it a poignant addition to the soundtrack of Amara Kaaviyam. The song's soothing melody and heartfelt lyrics evoke a sense of nostalgia and longing. It beautifully encapsulates the bittersweet moments of romance, making it relatable to anyone who has experienced love's ups and downs. With its enchanting duet, the song resonates deeply, leaving listeners with a lingering sense of emotion.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Saridhana Saridhana from Amara Kaaviyam is a mesmerizing duet that beautifully captures the essence of love and longing. With the enchanting voices of Thomson Andrews and Yazin, paired with M Ghibran's soulful composition, this song is sure to resonate with anyone who has experienced the bittersweet nature of romance. Dive into the emotional depths of this track and let it sweep you away!
stanzaMeanings: Before this, I was a boy. Now, am I a child in the middle of two? Are you real?
Before this, you were a friend. Now, are you a lover in the middle of two? Am I real?
Are shadows real? Is the magic that appears real?
Is this real? Is this me? Will I leave or rise? Am I still me?
Everything is new. Everything is beautiful. Yesterday, did I hear a song in my heart? Is it different?
Is this real? Is this me? Will I leave or rise? Am I still me?
When the heart beats, is it this? When girls look, does the heart feel? Is there no friend, no lover? Is that the question?
I have beautiful dreams. I have no end. The streets are cool, and I have the breeze. Now, from now on...
Are shadows real? Is the magic that appears real?
